summary: Iteration 94: Backend-only testing of AI Invoice Item Mapping Engine. All 24 tests PASSED (100%). Verified: 30-item internal catalog, fuzzy matching with confidence scoring, LEARNING mechanism (99.9% confidence on repeat items), review queue, CRUD operations, cross-vendor isolation, and invoice OCR regression.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with unique timestamps: TEST_* vendor mappings for learning, queue, delete, reject, and cross-vendor isolation tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 94 verified the complete Item Mapping Engine. Key findings: (1) GET /api/item-mapping/catalog returns 30 items with categories: seafood, proteins, produce, dairy, dry_goods, specialty, beverage, chemicals, supplies. (2) POST /api/item-mapping/match performs fuzzy matching with confidence thresholds: >=85% = auto_matched, >=50% = review, <50% = low_confidence. (3) LEARNING MECHANISM WORKS: After POST /api/item-mapping/approve, re-matching same vendor+description returns 99.9% confidence with source='learned'. (4) POST /api/item-mapping/queue-items adds items to review queue. (5) GET /api/item-mapping/unmapped returns queued items. (6) GET /api/item-mapping/stats returns dashboard stats including learning_rate. (7) Cross-vendor isolation verified: same item description from different vendors can map to different internal items. (8) Invoice OCR regression: /scan, /scan-and-map, /match-po all working.

learning_tests: CRITICAL: Re-matching approved item returns 99.9% confidence with source='learned' (PASSED)
isolation_tests: Cross-vendor isolation: same item maps differently per vendor (PASSED)

internal_catalog.details: 30 items seeded across 9 categories (seafood, proteins, produce, dairy, dry_goods, specialty, beverage, chemicals, supplies)

fuzzy_matching.details: Uses difflib.SequenceMatcher + token overlap for confidence scoring. Thresholds: >=85% auto_matched, >=50% review, <50% low_confidence

learning_mechanism.details: After POST /approve, re-matching same vendor+description returns 99.9% confidence with source='learned'

review_queue.details: POST /queue-items adds items, GET /unmapped retrieves queue

cross_vendor_isolation.details: Mappings are isolated by vendor_name_norm - same item from different vendors can map to different internal items

mocked_apis.note: Internal catalog is seeded from hardcoded data (30 items). No real vendor invoices - test data created with unique timestamps.
